title: "When mirror status changes to something change another status to something"
excerpt:
Hey guys! 
We need the automations: “When mirror status changes to something change another status to something”. 
Do we have any estimation for this feature? It will massively facilitate our work!!! 
Thanks

posts.author: Tomas (Tomas Iglesias)

posts.cookedHtml:

We discussed this feature on another thread too (Mirrored column automations announced).

posts.author: Tomas (Tomas Iglesias)
posts.cookedHtml: Want to get as more visibility as possible… I am dependent on this feature!
